action_buttons.mark_visited_label: Kẹ ne u te rrie ehe na
action_buttons.visited_hint: Kẹ ne u gha rhan eni irrie ẹre kua
action_buttons.mark_visited_hint: Ọ ya sẹ irrie ẹre ọ ya ruẹ ọda ighee
action_buttons.error_save: I gha sẹ kaadi. Kpaye ke gberra.
action_buttons.error_login: U ma gha wọlọ sẹ u gha rhan kaadi ẹghẹ.
action_buttons.error_invalid_date: Ẹdẹ ne u rhie i sẹ. Kpaye ke gberra.
action_buttons.schedule_failed_body: A i gha fie ẹre ne kalẹnda ẹre. Kpaye ke gberra.
action_buttons.place_closed_body: A ya khui ehe na vbe ẹdẹ ne ẹghẹ ne u rhie. Kpaye rhie ẹghẹ nọhọ.
action_buttons.scheduled_toast: A ya rhan ẹghẹ! A ya mu {{title}} rrie kalẹnda ẹre
action_buttons.closed_message: A ya khui ehe na vbe ẹdẹ ne ẹghẹ ne u rhie. Kẹ "Rhan ẹghẹ" ne u gha rhie ẹghẹ nọhọ.

match_factors.title: Ẹmwẹ Isẹ
match_factors.summary: Emwi na ya kẹ ne emwi na sẹ aro ẹre ne ọ i sẹ. Ebe ne ọ ga ne ọ kẹ ne ọ sẹ gbẹra.

companion_stops.title: Bẹ Ghe Iyawo Ẹre
companion_stops.subtitle: Bẹ ghe vbe ọkpa vbe ehe ne ọ vbe iyeke sẹ u gha se ọda
